summary: Tightened qd roadmap validation so node_notes records must reference existing nodes, use the accepted note kind vocabulary, keep non-blank id and text values, and avoid duplicate note ids.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects node_notes[] entries whose node_id is blank or does not match a node in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_node_note_node_ids checks trimmed node_notes[].node_id values against the export node id set; evidence/m4-qd-node-note-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-node-id.log records a temporary-copy export failing with an unknown node id.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects unknown node_notes[].kind values outside blocker and retry.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_node_notes validates node_notes kind values with the shared vocabulary helper; evidence/m4-qd-node-note-schema-contract/negative-smoke-unknown-kind.log records kind=unknown failing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh rejects blank node_notes[].id or node_notes[].text values.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_roadmap_node_note_required_strings trims id and text before accepting them; evidence/m4-qd-node-note-schema-contract/negative-smoke-blank-note-content.log records whitespace-only text failing.

validate_roadmap_node_note_duplicate_ids groups trimmed note ids and rejects repeated values; evidence/m4-qd-node-note-schema-contract/negative-smoke-duplicate-note-id.log records a temporary duplicate id failing.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.

Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and temporary-copy negative smoke tests for unknown node_id, unknown kind, blank note content, and duplicate note id.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains logs for direct qd report validation, the full Nix check, git diff whitespace checking, and all four temporary-copy negative smokes.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; no product runtime, macOS, hardware, capture, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency behavior is claimed.
